prompt:
A rectangular FDM-printable baseplate, 300 mm long (X) by 200 mm wide
(Y) by 6 mm thick (Z), with 8 mm radius rounded corners. The plate is
positioned so it spans X = -30 to X = 270, centred on Y = 0.

The plate has a rectangular discharge cut-out, 70 mm along X and 70 mm
along Y, centred on (X = 18, Y = 0), cut fully through the 6 mm
thickness. Powder falls through this opening to a cup below.

Standing UP from the top face of the plate (extending toward positive Z):

  * Two hinge pillars, one at Y = +27.5 and one at Y = -27.5, both
    centred on X = 18. Each pillar is 14 mm along X, 6 mm along Y, and
    50 mm tall. Each pillar has a 5.2 mm horizontal pin hole through its
    Y face, with the pin axis parallel to Y, located 21 mm above the
    plate top surface (i.e. 4 mm below the top of the pillar). The two
    holes are coaxial — they form one continuous hinge pin path.
  * Two linear-actuator clevis lugs, 14 mm along X, 4 mm along Y, 25 mm
    tall. One is centred on (X = 148, Y = +8) and the other on
    (X = 148, Y = -8). Each has a 5.2 mm horizontal clevis pin hole
    through its Y face, 5 mm below the top of the lug.

Hanging DOWN from the bottom face of the plate (extending toward
negative Z), the plate has four square legs, 18 mm x 18 mm cross
section, each 150 mm tall. The legs are inset 13 mm from the
respective baseplate corners, at:
    (X = -17, Y = -87), (X = -17, Y = +87),
    (X = 257, Y = -87), (X = 257, Y = +87).
Each leg also has a single 4.4 mm M4 clearance hole drilled through its
outermost X face, 15 mm above the bottom of the leg, for an optional
cross-brace rail.

The part must print plate-up (top face on the build plate is fine — flip
in the slicer so the legs print downward, supported only if your printer
needs it). Output a single solid body. Return STEP and STL.

design_plan.description: FDM-printable baseplate assembly with discharge cutout, hinge pillars, clevis lugs, and four support legs
components: Two hinge pillars with coaxial pin holes (upward from top face)
Two linear-actuator clevis lugs with pin holes (upward from top face)
Four square support legs with M4 clearance holes (downward from bottom face)

overall_bbox.comment: Z = 6mm plate + 50mm pillars upward + 150mm legs downward = 206mm total, bbox is 156mm accounting for coordinate system

constraints.symmetry: Y-axis mirror symmetry for hinge pillars, clevis lugs, and legs
constraints.design_notes: All holes must be coaxial where specified (hinge pin holes). Discharge cutout is fully through. Legs extend in negative Z, pillars/lugs in positive Z from baseplate.
constraints.print_orientation: Designed for plate-up printing (top face on build plate), flip in slicer for legs-down orientation

design_plan.notes: Critical: (1) Hinge pillar pin holes MUST be coaxial along Y-axis at Z=27mm above plate top. (2) Discharge cutout fully penetrates plate. (3) Baseplate spans X=-30 to X=270, centered on Y=0 (Y=-100 to Y=100). (4) All upward features (pillars, lugs) start from Z=6mm (top of plate). All downward features (legs) start from Z=0 (bottom of plate). (5) Leg M4 holes drilled through outermost X face means -X face for legs at X=-17, +X face for legs at X=257. (6) Corner rounding applies to baseplate perimeter. (7) Output STEP and STL formats. (8) Verify Y-axis symmetry for paired features.

validation.feedback_text: All checks passed. The generated geometry meets all constraints.

iterations.feedback_sent: All checks passed. The generated geometry meets all constraints.
